owner_name.comment: Sales rep who owns the opportunities in this row.

stage_name.comment: Pipeline stage the opportunities are in.

open_arr_usd.comment: Sum of ARR for opportunities still open (not closed).

won_arr_usd.comment: Sum of ARR for opportunities closed won.

weighted_open_arr_usd.name: weighted_open_arr_usd
weighted_open_arr_usd.comment: Open ARR multiplied by stage win probability.

weighted_arr_usd.name: weighted_arr_usd
weighted_arr_usd.comment: Total ARR weighted by win probability.
